author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Bokutachi wa Benkyou ga Dekinai', 'Himesama "Goumon" no Jikan desu' Creators Launch New Manga
The 28th issue of Weekly Shounen Jump magazine has begun serializing a new manga drawn by Taishi Tsutsui (Bokutachi wa Benkyou ga Dekinai) and written by Robinson Haruhara (Himesama "Goumon" no Jikan desu), titled Animal Signal, on Monday. Tsutsui serialized the Bokutachi wa Benkyou ga Dekinai (We Never Learn) manga in Weekly Shounen Jump from February 2017 to December 2020. Shueisha published the 21st and final volume in March 2021. VIZ Media licensed the manga and released the final...

text:
'Otome Kaijuu Caraméliser' Reveals Additional Staff, Theme Songs, Second Promo
The official website for a television anime adaptation of Ringo Naki's Otome Kaijuu Caraméliser (Kaiju Girl Caramelise) manga revealed additional staff, a second key visual (pictured above), the theme songs, and second promotional video on Sunday. The anime series is scheduled to premiere on July 3 at 1:28 a.m. on TBS, BS11, and AT-X Staff Prop Design: Hisashi Koinuma (Shabake) Kaijuu Design: Hiroyuki Taiga (Shangri-La Frontier) Art Director: Soushi Kuwajima (Mattaku Saikin no Tante...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Reiwa no Dara-san' Reveals Additional Cast, Ending Theme, Second Promo
The official website for a television anime adaptation of Haruomi Tomotsuka's Reiwa no Dara-san (Dara-san of Reiwa) manga revealed additional cast, the ending theme, and second promotional video on Sunday. The anime series is scheduled to premiere on July 2 at 9:30 p.m. on AT-X, followed by Tokyo MX, BS Nippon Television, and Kansai TV. Cast Amane Hasegawa: Aoi Koga (Kaguya-sama wa Kokurasetai) Naomichi Fudeki: Tomokazu Sugita (Mushoku Tensei: Isekai Ittara Honki Dasu) Miwa Ikago: Mai Aizaw...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Lv999 no Murabito' Reveals Additional Staff, Ending Theme, Second Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Koneko Hoshizuki's Lv999 no Murabito (The Villager of Level 999) light novel revealed additional staff, a key visual (pictured), the ending theme, and first promotional video on Sunday. The anime series is scheduled to premiere on July 2 at 12:00 a.m. on TV Tokyo, followed by BS Fuji.
